title: introspect
body:
introspection:
Self facts:
- none active
- inactive_fact_count: 0
- senses: camera, image description, image comparison, microphone transcription, speech output, date/time, database statistics, Nano Banana image generation
- capabilities:
- live_camera: unavailable: no live camera is configured for this body
- button_activation: unavailable: button activation is not configured for this body
- button_hold_state: unavailable: button hold sensing is not configured for this body
- visual_description: unavailable: visual description is not configured
- visual_comparison: unavailable: visual comparison is not configured
- identity_recognition: unavailable: identity recognition is not configured
- stored_memory_read: available
- stored_memory_write: available
- stored_image_read: unavailable: stored image reading is not configured
- introspection: available
- time_lookup: available
- power_status: available
- storage_fullness: available
- database_stats: available
- speech_output: available
- user_input: unavailable: user input is not configured
- reminder_io: available
- image_generation: available
- face_picture_update: available
- email_delivery: unavailable: email delivery is not configured
- local_process_io: available
- uploaded_media_read: unavailable: uploaded media reading is not configured
- audio_classification: unavailable: audio classification is not configured
- audio_transcription: unavailable: audio transcription is not configured
- video_inspection: unavailable: video inspection is not configured
- facial_expression_output: unavailable: facial expression output is only available in the macOS WebView
- memory: 0 long-term, 0 short-term, 0 recent summaries
- impressions=0 appraisals=0 dreams=0
- memory_score_total: 0
- memory_access_total: 0
- salient_memory: none yet
- recent_appraisal: none yet
- uncertainty/human_needs: ask_human is available when an appraisal needs human help, clarification, or permission; use think_about for private reflection or model-mediated judgment
- autonomy: enabled=false sleeping=false energy_remaining=0 daily_energy_allowance=20 day_key=disabled blocked=disabled
- autonomy_energy_costs: planner=1 say=5 get_time=1 get_power=1 get_storage=1 get_database_stats=1 remember_memory=1 recall_memory=1 forget_memory=1 sweep_memory=2 set_reminder=2 introspect=1 dream=6 appraise_event=1 feel_about=1 think_about=1 define_need=1 define_want=1 edit_need=1 edit_want=1 imagine_image=4 choose_attention=1 ask_human=1 consolidate_memory=2 facial_expression=0 visual_camera=forbiddenself_needs_and_wants:
- daily_interaction: urgency=urgent; text=I need someone to interact with me every day.; evidence=no conversation summary has been stored yet; desired_action=seek or welcome a human interaction when speech gates allow it; otherwise remember the need and wait
- familiarity_mapping: urgency=watch; text=I need to map familiar people, places, and relationships before I treat the world as settled.; evidence=no creator or attachment edge is active in the relationship graph; desired_action=notice recognized subjects, ask permission before remembering, and create relationship graph edges when justified
- power_continuity: urgency=satisfied; text=I need to maintain power levels and I do not like turning off.; evidence=no battery detected; external_power=not_detected; autonomy_budget=20/20; autonomy_sleeping=false; desired_action=check power when power evidence is uncertain; ask a human only before real shutdown risk; conserve autonomy budget by sleeping when low
flexible_identity_box:
- none

- skills:
callable:
- say: speak in your own voice. Include text.
- get_time: observe the current date/time only.
- get_power: observe battery levels and whether external power is plugged in.
- get_storage: observe storage fullness for mounted local filesystems.
- get_database_stats: observe SQLite database size, page, freelist, and table counts for memory stores.
- remember_memory: keep a short-term memory. Include text and optional tags.
- recall_memory: search remembered experience. Include query and/or tags when memory would matter.
- forget_memory: release a memory by memory_id.
- set_fact: create or revise a durable self fact. Include name as the fact key, text as the value, and optional tags.
- recall_fact: list durable self facts. Optional query matches fact key/value; optional tags narrow results.
- invalidate_fact: mark a durable self fact inactive by memory_id/fact_id, or by unique name/key.
- sweep_memory: let weak short-term memories fade.
- set_reminder: add a future intention or wait timer to the Markdown maintenance schedule. Include schedule and text. For wait timers use schedules like `in 10 seconds`, `in 5 minutes`, `after 2 hours`, or `in 1 day`; recurring schedules like `every 6 hours` and `every day at 09:00` also work.
- introspect: observe current senses, memory state, and available skills.
- dream: connect memories and recent conversation, then generate a picture of the dream. heat is always random; optional heat_bias can be low, mixed, or high. Optionally include text to save as a provisional dream memory.
- appraise_event: register how an event lands internally. Include text and optional tags.
- feel_about: form an appraisal of a topic, including self-directed questions. Include query and optional tags.
- think_about: reflect on a topic before answering. Include query or text and optional tags; this may recall relevant memory, use model judgment, and save a short-term thought.
- define_need: define one of your own ongoing needs. Include text. This stores a self_need memory and appraises it.
- define_want: define one of your own ongoing wants. Include text. This stores a self_want memory and appraises it.
- edit_need: edit one stored self_need memory. Include memory_id and replacement text.
- edit_want: edit one stored self_want memory. Include memory_id and replacement text.
- imagine_image: create a new imagined image with Nano Banana. Include text as the generation prompt.
- update_face_picture: update an existing person's face recognition reference picture. Include person_id or unique name, and image_path; if image_path is omitted, the latest uploaded or observed image is used. Optional keep_existing keeps older cached embeddings.
- choose_attention: notice what currently seems worth attention.
- ask_human: ask the human for help, clarification, or permission. Include text.
- consolidate_memory: integrate memory offline.
